self_report.reflection: Equal areas force ∫₀^{x₂}(c − (2x − 3x³))dx = 0, giving c = x₂ − (3/4)x₂³. Combined with c = 2x₂ − 3x₂³ on the curve, subtracting yields x₂ = 2/3, hence c = 4/9. Feasibility checks (c below f_max = 4√2/9, x₂ past the peak at √2/3) all hold.
self_report.notes: Derivation gives a unique c that matches 4/9 exactly, with all geometric feasibility conditions satisfied.
